events.title: Tech Talk: AI in Web Development
events.description: Join us for an exciting presentation about how AI is transforming web development. We'll cover practical applications, tools, and future trends.

events.title: Morning Hike: South Mountain
events.description: Start your weekend with a refreshing hike up South Mountain! We'll meet at the trailhead and hike together. All skill levels welcome.

events.title: Startup Pitch Night
events.description: Local entrepreneurs will pitch their startup ideas to fellow founders and potential investors. Great networking opportunity!

events.title: Photography Walk: Downtown Phoenix
events.description: Explore downtown Phoenix with your camera! We'll visit interesting architecture, street art, and capture the city's energy.

events.title: Foodie Tour: Best Tacos in Phoenix
events.description: Join fellow food lovers as we discover the best taco spots in Phoenix! We'll visit 3-4 locations and rate our favorites.
